headline: Rollins Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: ROL's Q1 revenues are expected to grow, driven by Orkin demand, digital tools and pricing strategies, but the model signals no clear beat.

headline: Rollins (ROL) To Report Earnings Tomorrow: Here Is What To Expect
summary: Pest control company Rollins (NYSE:ROL) will be reporting results this Wednesday after the bell. Here’s what to look for.
